name: view scope player nfl teams year offset range
description: Locks player_nfl_teams + year_offset range (with year split) registers per-game CTE and emits array_agg(DISTINCT unnest(teams)) override
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024,2025,2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('RB')), "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2025, 2026) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2025, 2026) group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT array_agg(DISTINCT t) FROM (SELECT unnest(t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.teams) AS t FROM t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2 WHERE t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.pid = player.pid AND t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.year BETWEEN player_years.year + 1 AND player_years.year + 9) sub) AS "player_nfl_teams_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('RB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
